posts.author: Deepak_Kumar_Singh
posts.text: SIF in Zerodha Coin? — Hi @rahulshanbhag89 , The SIF schemes offered by Altiva, Magnum are currently interval funds, which have limited liquidity and allow redemptions only twice a week. At present, we are offering open-ended SIF schemes on Coin to ensure better liquidity and flexibility for investors. Once these AMCs launch open-ended SIF schemes, they will be made available on Coin for both purchase and redemption. The interval SIFs are available on the secondary market and can be purchased directly through Kite.

posts.text: SIF in Zerodha Coin? — There has been a lot of progress, we are in the last phase of testing the whole operational flow and a few fixes from the exchanges in terms of the initial amount of investment. Once that is done and we get a green flag from the exchange we will launch SIFs on Coin.
